title: Lure of the Sila
writer: Giuseppe Gironda, Mario Monicelli, Carlo Musso
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, Silvana Mangano, Jacques Sernas
plot: Returning home after a night of love spent in a woodman's hut with Orsola, Pietro is arrested by the police for a crime he did not commit. His mother and youngest sister, Rosaria, go to Orsola begging her to provide Pietro with th...
